channel.title: Qualcomm, Inc. — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Qualcomm, Inc. (qualcomm).

item.title: CVE-2026-25277 · 8.8 HIGH — Buffer Copy Without Checking Size of Input in Secure Processor
item.description: Memory corruption while using Strongbox due to buffer overflow.

item.title: CVE-2026-25276 · 8.8 HIGH — Improper Validation of Array Index in Secure Processor
item.description: Memory corruption while using Strongbox due to missing bounds check.

item.title: CVE-2026-25260 · 7.8 HIGH — Time-of-check Time-of-use (TOCTOU) Race Condition in DSP Service
item.description: Memory Corruption when accessing shared buffers without validation of concurrent user-mode input modifications.

item.title: CVE-2026-25259 · 7.8 HIGH — Out-of-bounds Write in DSP Service
item.description: Memory corruption while processing multiple IOCTL command for escape operations.

item.title: CVE-2026-25258 · 7.8 HIGH — Out-of-bounds Read in DSP Service
item.description: Memory corruption while processing IOCTL calls for escape operations.

item.title: CVE-2026-24092 · 7.2 HIGH — Improper Validation of Syntactic Correctness of Input in Display
item.description: Memory Corruption when processing fastboot commands to set display mode.

item.title: CVE-2026-24091 · 7.2 HIGH — Improper Validation of Syntactic Correctness of Input in Display
item.description: Memory corruption while processing fastboot commands with improperly formatted input.

item.title: CVE-2026-24090 · 7.1 HIGH — Missing Authentication for Critical Function in HLOS
item.description: Cryptographic issue while processing partition table entries allows unauthorized modification of boot flow.

item.title: CVE-2026-24089 · 7.2 HIGH — Improper Validation of Syntactic Correctness of Input in Kernel
item.description: Memory corruption while processing fastboot commands with invalid input.

item.title: CVE-2026-24088 · 8.2 HIGH — Missing Authentication for Critical Function in Boot
item.description: Cryptographic Issue while processing a specific partition which allows unauthorized write access to load a customized bootloader.

item.title: CVE-2026-24087 · 7.2 HIGH — Improper Validation of Syntactic Correctness of Input in Kernel
item.description: Memory corruption while processing fastboot OEM commands.

item.title: CVE-2026-24085 · 7.2 HIGH — Stack-based Buffer Overflow in Display
item.description: Memory Corruption when processing display command line information due to improper initialization of a variable.

item.title: CVE-2025-59614 · 6.7 MEDIUM — Out-of-bounds Write in Windows Compute
item.description: Memory Corruption when sending random number generator command with insufficient output buffer size.

item.title: CVE-2025-59613 · 6.7 MEDIUM — Stack-based Buffer Overflow in Windows Compute
item.description: Memory Corruption when output buffer size is smaller than input buffer size during data copying operation.

item.title: CVE-2025-59612 · 6.7 MEDIUM — Stack-based Buffer Overflow in Windows Compute
item.description: Memory corruption in windows drivers while sending incorrect trusted application request

item.title: CVE-2025-59611 · 6.7 MEDIUM — Out-of-bounds Write in Core Services
item.description: Memory corruption in diagnostic services due to absence of input validation

item.title: CVE-2025-59610 · 6.4 MEDIUM — Time-of-check Time-of-use (TOCTOU) Race Condition in Camera Driver
item.description: Memory Corruption when processing IOCTL requests with mismatched API versions due to concurrent modification of user-space buffer.

item.title: CVE-2025-59609 · 5.5 MEDIUM — Buffer Over-read in WLAN Host Communication
item.description: Information Disclosure when processing advertisement frames with malformed MBSSID elements of insufficient length.

item.title: CVE-2025-59606 · 7.8 HIGH — NULL Pointer Dereference in HLOS
item.description: Memory Corruption when writing to invalid memory locations occurs due to heap memory exhaustion during secure data initialization.

item.title: CVE-2025-59605 · 7.8 HIGH — Out-of-bounds Write in HLOS
item.description: Memory Corruption when processing device identifier strings that exceed the expected maximum length.

item.title: CVE-2025-59604 · 7.8 HIGH — NULL Pointer Dereference in SPS Applications
item.description: Memory Corruption when running a memory copy operation due to invalid writes caused by a null pointer.

item.title: CVE-2025-59601 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Exposure of Sensitive Information Through Metadata in Powerline Communication Firmware
item.description: Information Disclosure when resetting device to factory default settings through powerline interface allows unauthorized access to device configuration.

item.title: CVE-2026-25293 · 9.6 CRITICAL — Incorrect authorization in PLC FW
item.description: Buffer overflow due to incorrect authorization in PLC FW

item.title: CVE-2026-25266 · 5.5 MEDIUM — Exposed dangerous function in windows host
item.description: Memory corruption while processing IOCTL command when device is in power-save state.

item.title: CVE-2026-24082 · 7.8 HIGH — Use After Free in Automotive GPU
item.description: Memory Corruption when copying data from a freed source while executing performance counter deselect operation.

item.title: CVE-2025-47408 · 7.8 HIGH — Untrusted Pointer Dereference in Power Optimization Firmware
item.description: Memory corruption when another driver calls an IOCTL with invalid input/output buffer.

item.title: CVE-2025-47407 · 7.8 HIGH — Time-of-check Time-of-use (TOCTOU) Race Condition in DSP Service
item.description: Memory corruption while creating a process on the digital signal processor due to allocation failure at the kernel level.

item.title: CVE-2025-47406 · 6.1 MEDIUM — Buffer Over-read in DSP Service
item.description: Information Disclosure while processing IOCTL handler callbacks without verifying buffer size.

item.title: CVE-2025-47405 · 7.8 HIGH — Untrusted Pointer Dereference in Camera
item.description: Memory corruption when processing camera sensor input/output control codes with invalid output buffers.

item.title: CVE-2025-47404 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Buffer Copy Without Checking Size of Input in Automotive Audio
item.description: Memory corruption when dynamically changing the size of a previously allocated buffer while its contents are being modified.

item.title: CVE-2025-47403 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Buffer Over-read in WLAN Firmware
item.description: Transient DOS when processing a malformed Fast Transition response frame with an invalid header structure during wireless roaming.

item.title: CVE-2025-47401 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Buffer Over-read in WLAN HAL
item.description: Transient DOS when processing target power rate tables during channel configuration.

item.title: CVE-2026-21382 · 7.8 HIGH — Buffer Copy Without Checking Size of Input in Power Management IC
item.description: Memory Corruption when handling power management requests with improperly sized input/output buffers.

item.title: CVE-2026-21381 · 7.6 HIGH — Buffer Over-read in WLAN Firmware
item.description: Transient DOS when receiving a service data frame with excessive length during device matching over a neighborhood awareness network protocol connection.

item.title: CVE-2026-21380 · 7.8 HIGH — Use After Free in DSP Service
item.description: Memory Corruption when using deprecated DMABUF IOCTL calls to manage video memory.

item.title: CVE-2026-21378 · 7.8 HIGH — Buffer Over-read in Camera
item.description: Memory Corruption when accessing an output buffer without validating its size during IOCTL processing in a camera sensor driver.

item.title: CVE-2026-21376 · 7.8 HIGH — Buffer Over-read in Camera
item.description: Memory Corruption when accessing an output buffer without validating its size during IOCTL processing in a camera sensor driver.

item.title: CVE-2026-21375 · 7.8 HIGH — Buffer Over-read in Camera
item.description: Memory Corruption when accessing an output buffer without validating its size during IOCTL processing.

item.title: CVE-2026-21374 · 7.8 HIGH — Buffer Over-read in Camera
item.description: Memory Corruption when processing auxiliary sensor input/output control commands with insufficient buffer size validation.

item.title: CVE-2026-21373 · 7.8 HIGH — Buffer Over-read in Camera
item.description: Memory Corruption when accessing an output buffer without validating its size during IOCTL processing.

item.title: CVE-2026-21372 · 7.8 HIGH — Heap-Based Buffer Overflow in Power Management IC
item.description: Memory Corruption when sending IOCTL requests with invalid buffer sizes during memcpy operations.

item.title: CVE-2026-21371 · 7.8 HIGH — Buffer Over-read in WinBlast Driver
item.description: Memory Corruption when retrieving output buffer with insufficient size validation.

item.title: CVE-2026-21367 · 7.6 HIGH — Buffer Over-read in WLAN Firmware
item.description: Transient DOS when processing nonstandard FILS Discovery Frames with out-of-range action sizes during initial scans.

item.title: CVE-2025-47400 · 7.1 HIGH — Buffer Over-read in Computer Vision
item.description: Cryptographic issue while copying data to a destination buffer without validating its size.

item.title: CVE-2025-47392 · 8.8 HIGH — Integer Overflow or Wraparound in GPS
item.description: Memory corruption when decoding corrupted satellite data files with invalid signature offsets.

item.title: CVE-2025-47391 · 7.8 HIGH — Stack-based Buffer Overflow in Camera Driver
item.description: Memory corruption while processing a frame request from user.

item.title: CVE-2025-47390 · 7.8 HIGH — Buffer Over-read in Camera
item.description: Memory corruption while preprocessing IOCTL request in JPEG driver.

item.title: CVE-2025-47389 · 7.8 HIGH — Buffer Copy Without Checking Size of Input in Automotive Platform
item.description: Memory corruption when buffer copy operation fails due to integer overflow during attestation report generation.

item.title: CVE-2025-47374 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Use After Free in Camera Driver
item.description: Memory Corruption when accessing freed memory due to concurrent fence deregistration and signal handling.

item.title: CVE-2026-21385 · 7.8 HIGH 💥 — Integer Overflow or Wraparound in Graphics
item.description: Memory corruption while using alignments for memory allocation.
